title: cleidion lasiophyllum
intro: Cleidion lasiophyllum, also known as the New Zealand pepper tree, is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cleidion lasiophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
